name: Telegram Mini App expense capture flow
description: Build the TMA-first expense create surface with `date + category -> amount + source + note -> household + group + preview` routing, Telegram back/bottom button coordination, and the same worker expense rules already used by web.

planned: Use SPA routes for `date + category -> amount + source + note -> household + group + preview` without full reload navigation.
Keep amount/category/source/household/group semantics aligned with current product specs and worker contracts.
Add TMA-specific UX work only where it changes interaction quality: bottom button, back button, haptics, and device-local cache hints.

notes: This is the first user-visible value slice for the TMA client and should ship early for real usage feedback.
